summary: Tax/Fiscal Module testing completed. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: System Settings page shows all tax/fiscal configs (IVA rates, SENIAT, dot matrix). Products page shows IVA column with color-coded rates and form has IVA selector. POS receipt dialog has 4 print buttons in code but couldn't test UI due to POS login issue.

minor.issue: POS login uses master database but tenant users exist in tenant database - prevents POS UI testing with tenant credentials

integration_issues.issue: Cannot login to POS with tenant credentials (shop1admin/shop1pass) - login hits /api/auth/login which checks master db, not tenant db

action_items: Fix POS login to work with tenant users (either use tenant-login endpoint or query tenant database for user auth)
Verify 4 print buttons work in POS receipt dialog after fixing POS login
critical_code_review_comments: POS page handleLogin() at line 224 uses /auth/login which queries master db - should use /auth/tenant-login or modify /auth/login to check tenant db when tenant context exists

success_rate.frontend: 80% (POS receipt dialog untested due to login issue)

seed_data_creation: Created test products with various tax rates (16%, 8%, 0%) via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tax module backend is fully functional. Frontend Settings/Products pages work correctly. POS login needs fix - the /auth/login endpoint should support tenant user authentication for POS access. After fixing POS login, verify: 1) Receipt dialog shows 4 print buttons (80mm, A4, Fiscal SENIAT, Mayorista), 2) Tax breakdown displays in receipt dialog, 3) Each print button triggers correct print template

system_settings.iva_section: ✓ IVA habilitado, IVA incluido en precio, Tasa predeterminada (16/8/0%), legend for rates
system_settings.seniat_section: ✓ Habilitar SENIAT, Serial MF, NIT, IP, Puerto, Prefijo Fiscal
system_settings.dot_matrix_section: ✓ Habilitar Matriz de Puntos, IP, Puerto

products_page.table: ✓ IVA column with color-coded rates (amber=16%, blue=8%, green=0%)
products_page.form: ✓ IVA (%) dropdown with 16% General, 8% Reducido, 0% Exento options

backend_apis.get_system_settings: ✓ Returns tax_enabled, tax_included_in_price, default_tax_rate, tax_rates, SENIAT/dot matrix fields
backend_apis.product_crud: ✓ tax_rate field works (create, read, update with 16/8/0%)

pos_receipt_dialog.print_buttons: Code verified: 4 buttons exist (data-testid: print-receipt-btn, print-invoice-btn, print-fiscal-btn, print-dotmatrix-btn)
pos_receipt_dialog.tax_breakdown: Code verified: Displays IVA breakdown by rate in receipt dialog
pos_receipt_dialog.ui_verified: NOT TESTED - POS login issue blocks access
